steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says Morris's repudiation of industrialization is exemplified by the Kelmscott editions' handmade materials. The blank must show that his anti-industrial stance is clearly visible through those materials.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'insensible to': means unaware of or unaffected by. This would say his stance ignores the very materials that prove it — the opposite of the passage's logic. ✗
  • Choice B — 'manifest in': means clearly expressed through. His rejection of industry is expressed through handmade materials, which 'exemplify' it. Direct match. ✓
  • Choice C — 'scrutinized by': means examined by. This reverses the direction — the materials would be analyzing his stance, not expressing it. ✗
  • Choice D — 'complicated by': means made more difficult by. The passage says the materials exemplify his stance, not complicate it. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
